Awarded Contract
  • 89 Cambridge Park Road Fitout

  • Request for Tender
  • Awarded
  • DPOJ0160
  • 20/11/2025
  • From 08/11/2025 to 03/04/2027

Business Is this a Tasmanian Business ? * Business Address Allocated Amount
Tascon Constructions Pty Ltd Yes
59 Albert Road
Moonah
Tasmania
Australia 7009
 $3,025,440
*A Tasmanian business is a business operating in Tasmania that has a permanent office or presence in Tasmania and which employs Tasmanian workers.

  • $3,025,440

  • Naomi Barnard
  • Email: Naomi.barnard@justice.tas.gov.au
  • 8
  • 8
Name Firm/Agency
Peter Gaggin Philp Lighton Architects
  • Department of Justice
  • Level 1, 85 Collins St
  • Hobart Tasmania 7000
  • Building and Facility Construction and Maintenance Services

The Department of Justice is seeking the services of a suitably qualified builder to undertake the fitout of 89 Cambridge Park Drive, Cambridge.

 

  • South
Naomi Barnard (03) 6165 9561
Naomi.barnard@justice.tas.gov.au
An industry pre-tender briefing session about this RFT and the procurement will be held as follows: Location: 89 Cambridge Park Drive, Tenancy 1 (Entrance via Bungana Way). Date and time: Tuesday, 7 October 2025 at 10.00am (Hobart time). Persons who wish to attend the briefing session must pre-register with the Contact Officer on or before the tender briefing.
